## Meeting Purpose

[Review and improve SEO content workflow for SchoolAI to better align with educator needs and readability.](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift content focus to best teaching practices, pedagogy, and real classroom challenges](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Improve scannability with descriptive headers, bullet points, and key takeaways at the top](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Target 900-1100 word count for shorter pieces, balancing SEO needs with educator time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Avoid overly technical AI explanations and language that portrays teachers as martyrs/superheroes](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

## Topics

### Content Focus and Tone

  - [Lean into best teaching practices, pedagogy, and "why" behind AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Avoid over-indexing on technical AI explanations (e.g. how LLMs work)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Strike balance between formal tone and accessibility (pre-K through higher ed)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Frame teachers as professionals, not martyrs/superheroes ("making school awesome every day")](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)

### Readability and Structure

  - [Improve scannability with descriptive H2/H3 headers (not generic)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Use bullet points, numbered sections for visual flow](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Limit text under headers to \~2 paragraphs max](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Consider "read more" expandable sections to avoid overwhelming readers](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Move key takeaways to top of articles (currently at bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

### Word Count and SEO

  - [Target 900-1100 words for shorter pieces (including key takeaways)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Balance SEO needs with educator time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
  - [Maintain content pyramids (broad topics -\> granular supporting pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)

### Educator-Friendly Resources

  - [Create AI terminology glossary page (link terms in articles)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Emulate Edutopia's educator-friendly format (short, chunked content)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn/Megan: Update content workflow artifacts with meeting insights](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=2115.0)
  - [Experiment with key takeaways at top of articles (A/B test)](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Nikki: Consider design/formatting changes to improve readability](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Maureen: Review broader "AI for middle school teachers" piece for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Team: Continually refine balance between SEO needs and educator-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/utKKRTDkjxwww-K7qyCTDXFYmaSovEoC?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
